title: Kenyan Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy Kenyan-inspired curry dish made with chicken and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the curry powder, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the coconut milk and tangy curry sauce, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to medium-low and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 15-20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
Serve with rice, naan bread, or roti for a complete meal.
